name: figma
description: Figma read workflows powered by Playbot-native auth and MCP.

interface.longDescription: Inspect Figma designs and prepare design-to-code work through Playbot's Figma MCP server without ChatGPT or OpenAI connector setup.
defaultPrompt: Inspect a Figma design and implement it in code
Read specific nodes from a Figma file
Summarize a Figma file for implementation
